description: Initial screen state: A dark overlay with white text instructions for screen sharing is visible on the Useberry platform.
frame_description: A dark screen with the message 'Please click the screen sharing button that appears, and choose the option to share this window.' is shown.

description: Task instructions are progressively revealed on the screen, detailing a flight booking scenario on the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: White text on a dark background describes the user's task to book a return domestic flight.

description: An 'Open' button appears below the task instructions.
frame_description: A circular button with the label 'Open' and an external link icon appears at the bottom center of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to launch the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button as it is clicked.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage in a new tab.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Travel Deals | Flight Centre
frame_description: A new tab opens, initially blank, then begins loading the Flight Centre website.

description: The Flight Centre homepage finishes loading, revealing the main navigation and a 'TROPICAL ISLANDS SALE' banner.
frame_description: The Flight Centre website is fully rendered, showing a red header and a large promotional banner with beach imagery.

description: User clicks on the 'Where to?' destination input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the destination search box in the flight booking widget.

description: A dropdown menu appears below the destination field, listing popular cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane.
frame_description: A list of popular destinations appears as a dropdown from the 'Where to?' input.

description: User clicks on the date range selector in the search widget.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the date field which currently shows a default range in February and March.

description: A date picker calendar opens, showing February and March 2026.
frame_description: A calendar overlay appears over the search widget.

description: User hovers over March 13th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 13 in the March 2026 calendar view.

description: User hovers over March 15th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 15 in the March 2026 calendar view.

description: User hovers over March 20th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 20 in the March 2026 calendar view.

description: User hovers over March 22nd in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 22 in the March 2026 calendar view.

description: User selects March 20th in the calendar.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date 20 in the March calendar.

description: User selects March 22nd in the calendar.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date 22 in the March calendar, completing the date range selection.

description: User selects March 20, 2026, as the departure date in the calendar picker.
frame_description: A 'Travel dates' modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing calendars for February and March 2026.

description: The calendar modal header changes to 'Returning travel dates' after the departure date is selected.
frame_description: The travel dates modal now highlights the return date selection step.

description: User selects March 22, 2026, as the return date.
frame_description: The user clicks on the date '22' in the March calendar within the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm their date selection.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Done' button in the bottom right corner of the modal.

description: The travel dates modal closes, revealing the updated search form.
frame_description: The homepage is visible again with the selected dates populated in the search bar.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Search flights' button in the search bar.

description: The page navigates from the homepage to the flight search results page.
frame_description: The screen transitions through a white loading state as the new URL loads.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'.
frame_description: A centered modal with a loading spinner and text is visible over a blurred background.

description: The flight search results for the departure leg are displayed.
frame_description: The search results page is fully loaded, showing a list of flights from Adelaide to Melbourne.

description: User clicks on the 'From $127' button for the first flight option.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue price button on the first flight card.

description: The selected flight row expands to reveal 'Lite', 'Choice', and 'Flex' fare options.
frame_description: Three fare category columns appear below the flight details.

description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the 'Lite' fare category.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Select' button under the $127 Lite fare column.

description: A 'Good choice!' loading overlay is displayed.
frame_description: A modal with 'Good choice!' and a loading spinner appears on screen.

description: The list of return flights is displayed.
frame_description: The page content refreshes to show 'Select Return Flight' with a new list of options.

description: User scrolls down through the return flight search results.
frame_description: The page content moves vertically as the user scrolls.

description: User hovers over the 'From $242' button for the 11:00am return flight.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over a price button in the middle of the results list.

description: User clicks on the 'From $187' button for the 12:40pm return flight.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the price button for a flight further down the list.

description: Fare types for the selected return flight are displayed.
frame_description: The return flight row expands to show fare categories.

description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the return flight's 'Lite' fare.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Select' button for the $187 fare.

description: A 'Good choice!' loading overlay appears after selecting the return flight.
frame_description: The loading modal is visible as the segment ends.

description: Click on the flight price button to expand fare options.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flight results and clicks on the price of a Virgin Australia flight.

description: The fare selection menu expands below the selected flight row.
frame_description: A new section titled 'Select Returning Fare Type' appears, showing Lite, Choice, and Flex options.

description: Hover over the different fare options (Lite, Choice, Flex).
frame_description: The cursor moves across the three fare option cards.

description: Click the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare option.
frame_description: The user clicks the blue SELECT button under the Lite fare column.

description: Navigate from flight results to the 'Review trip' page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The page transitions from the flight results list to a summary of the selected trip.

description: A loading overlay with the text 'All Set!' appears while the next page loads.
frame_description: The screen is covered by a white overlay with a loading spinner and the text 'All Set!'.

description: Scroll down the Review trip page.
frame_description: The user scrolls vertically to view the lower portion of the trip summary.

description: Hover over the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the seat selection button in the Add-ons section.

description: Scroll to the bottom of the Review trip page.
frame_description: The user scrolls to the very bottom of the page, revealing the 'CONTINUE' button.

description: Hover over the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the green CONTINUE button.

description: Click the 'CONTINUE' button.
frame_description: The user activates the CONTINUE button.

description: Navigate to the 'Travellers' details page.
page_title: Flight Centre | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays, Cruises & More
frame_description: The page loads the passenger information form.

description: The passenger information form fields load and become visible.
frame_description: The 'Adult 1' section of the form expands to show Title, First name, and Last name fields.

description: User types 'Thank you for working through th. Shall we move on to the next part?' into the First name field.
frame_description: The user types a long sentence into the first name input box.
